issues.description: Missing condition: effect has optional cost ('You may place 1 Stage with a cost of 1 at the bottom of the owner's deck') that must be represented as a condition or prerequisite
SearchDeck filter is incomplete: must specify filter for '[Upper Yard] or {Shandian Warrior}' type cards, not 'Any'. Should filter by type matching Upper Yard OR Shandian Warrior
SearchDeck scope is wrong: should look at 5 cards from top of deck, then reveal up to 1 matching card. Current DSL does not capture the 'look at 5 cards' scope limit or the 'up to 1' reveal limit
Missing action: after revealing and adding card to hand, remaining 4 cards must be placed 'at the bottom of your deck in any order' - this ordering step is not represented

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] You may place 1 Stage with a cost of 1 at the bottom of the owner's deck: Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 [Upper Yard] or {Shandian Warrior} type card and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.

actions.description: Place remaining cards at bottom of deck in any order
